title: About
text: This website is generated with Quarto as a static site and is published to GitHub Pages from the gh-pages branch via GitHub Actions.

title: About
text:
Repository layout

final_project/midterm.qmd — source for the job-posting analysis (Python chunks).
final_project/website/ — Quarto website project (_quarto.yml, pages, styles).

The Midterm analysis page is a mock with one live Adzuna request (first results page) when credentials are set. For GitHub Actions, add repository secrets ADZUNA_APP_ID and ADZUNA_APP_KEY; if they are missing, the page still renders using a placeholder table. Swap in your full report (e.g. include final_project/midterm.qmd) when you publish the complete analysis.

title: About
text:
Deploying

In the GitHub repo, enable Pages: Settings → Pages → Build and deployment → Source: GitHub Actions.
Push to main to run .github/workflows/publish-quarto.yml, which renders this site and publishes to gh-pages.

The live site URL follows GitHub Pages for this repo: https://richard098789.github.io/JSC370/ (adjust if your username or repo name differs).

title: Home
text:
Welcome. This site hosts the JSC370 final project materials, including the midterm analysis of Canadian data-job postings (Adzuna API).
Use the navigation bar to open the Midterm analysis page or About.
The course repository contains source files, including final_project/midterm.qmd and this website under final_project/website/.
